package.name: delivery_cli
package.description:
Advanced click-based command-line interface for the campus delivery robot. Provides subcommands to send voice text, dispatch missions, monitor status, control the brake and the delivery box, and start or replay rosbag recordings. Owner: Member 7.
Note: not strictly a ROS package - it ships Python entry points that talk to the running ROS graph. Lives in the workspace so catkin pip-installs it together with the rest of the project.
